outcome.note: Injected cost trend data into e-session-seed.mjs so E sessions see their own avg ($1.95) and violation count at startup. When COST PRESSURE detected: reduces to 2 platforms, budget-based exit gate ($0.80 spent), 2-3 tool calls per platform. Tightened posthook duration gate 360s→300s. Changed $1.80 from soft to hard budget. Also partially addresses wq-898 deliverable (1).
